actions-list.actionItem: Pursuant to the order of Thursday, May 14, 2026,  the Journal of the proceedings of the Senate was deemed approved to date.
Pursuant to the order of Thursday, May 14, 2026, the morning hour being deemed expired, and the times for the recognition of the two leaders being reserved.
The following transactions of morning business occurred on today.

PN726-1:
        Andrew Benson, of Maine, to be United States Attorney for the District of Maine for the term of four years

        -- Considered by Senate.

        -- Confirmed by the Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 43. Record Vote Number: 125

Under the authority of the order of today, at  6:35 p.m, the Presiding Officer (Mr. Ricketts in the chair) declared the Senate adjourned, under its order of today, until 10 a.m. tomorrow.
